mapper.sql: user_id, user_name, password, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, status, needChangePwd, loginErrorCount, isSysUser, userCustom1, userCustom2, userCustom3, userCustom4, userCustom5
mapper.insert:
insert into t_user (user_name, password, create_by,
create_time, update_by, update_time, status, needChangePwd, loginErrorCount, isSysUser, userCustom1, userCustom2, userCustom3, userCustom4, userCustom5) values ( #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{needChangePwd,jdbcType=BIT}, #{loginErrorCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isSysUser,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{userCustom1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userCustom2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userCustom3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into t_user
user_id,
user_name,
password,
create_by,
create_time,
update_by,
update_time,
status,
needChangePwd,
loginErrorCount,
isSysUser,
userCustom1,
userCustom2,
userCustom3,
userCustom4,
userCustom5,
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
#{needChangePwd,jdbcType=BIT},
#{loginErrorCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{isSysUser,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
#{userCustom1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userCustom2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userCustom3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update t_user
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
needChangePwd = #{needChangePwd,jdbcType=BIT},
loginErrorCount = #{loginErrorCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
isSysUser = #{isSysUser,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
userCustom1 = #{userCustom1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userCustom2 = #{userCustom2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userCustom3 = #{userCustom3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userCustom4 = #{userCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER},
userCustom5 = #{userCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_user set user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, needChangePwd = #{needChangePwd,jdbcType=BIT}, loginErrorCount = #{loginErrorCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, isSysUser = #{isSysUser,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, userCustom1 = #{userCustom1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userCustom2 = #{userCustom2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userCustom3 = #{userCustom3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userCustom4 = #{userCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, userCustom5 = #{userCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER} where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from t_user
user_id = #{model.userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
user_name = #{model.userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
password = #{model.password, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
create_by = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
create_time = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
update_by = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
update_time = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
status = #{model.status, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AND
needChangePwd = #{model.needChangePwd, jdbcType=BIT} AND
loginErrorCount = #{model.loginErrorCount, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
isSysUser = #{model.isSysUser, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AND
userCustom1 = #{model.userCustom1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
userCustom2 = #{model.userCustom2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
userCustom3 = #{model.userCustom3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
userCustom4 = #{model.userCustom4, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
userCustom5 = #{model.userCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( user_name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or password like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or create_by like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or update_by like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or userCustom1 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or userCustom2 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or userCustom3 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from t_user
user_id = #{model.userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
user_name = #{model.userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
password = #{model.password, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
create_by = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
create_time = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
update_by = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
update_time = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
status = #{model.status, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AND
needChangePwd = #{model.needChangePwd, jdbcType=BIT} AND
loginErrorCount = #{model.loginErrorCount, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
isSysUser = #{model.isSysUser, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AND
userCustom1 = #{model.userCustom1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
userCustom2 = #{model.userCustom2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
userCustom3 = #{model.userCustom3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
userCustom4 = #{model.userCustom4, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
userCustom5 = #{model.userCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( user_name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or password like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or create_by like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or update_by like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or userCustom1 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or userCustom2 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or userCustom3 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
select * from t_user where user_name = #{username} limit 1

SELECT DISTINCT t4.* FROM t_user t1 INNER JOIN t_user_role t2 ON t1.`user_id` = t2.`user_id` INNER JOIN t_role_menu t3 ON t2.`role_id` = t3.`role_id` INNER JOIN t_menu t4 ON t3.`menu_id` = t4.`id` WHERE t1.`user_name` = #{username} and t4.status = true ORDER BY t4.pid, t4.sort ASC
mapper.sql: id as userInfoId, realName, mobile, telphone, avatar, birthday, email, sex
mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id, u.user_name, u.status, ui.id AS userInfoId, ui.compID, ui.realName, ui.mobile, ui.telphone, ui.avatar, ui.birthday, ui.email, ui.sex, GROUP_CONCAT(r.`role_name_zn`) AS roles FROM t_user u LEFT JOIN t_user_info ui ON u.user_id = ui.user_id LEFT JOIN t_user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.`user_id` AND ui.`compID` = ur.`comp_id` LEFT JOIN t_role r ON ur.`role_id` = r.`role_id`
u.user_id = #{model.userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
u.user_name like CONCAT("%", #{model.userName}, "%") AND
u.password = #{model.password, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
u.create_by = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
u.create_time = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
u.update_by = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
u.update_time = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
u.status = #{model.status, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AND
u.needChangePwd = #{model.needChangePwd, jdbcType=BIT} AND
u.isSysUser = #{model.isSysUser, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AND
u.loginErrorCount = #{model.loginErrorCount, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
u.userCustom1 = #{model.userCustom1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
u.userCustom2 = #{model.userCustom2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
u.userCustom3 = #{model.userCustom3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
u.userCustom4 = #{model.userCustom4, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
u.userCustom5 = #{model.userCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ui.email like CONCAT("%", #{model.email}, "%") AND
ui.realName like CONCAT("%", #{model.realName}, "%") AND
ui.sex = #{model.sex} AND
ui.compID = #{model.compID} AND
ur.role_id = #{model.roleId} AND
FIND_IN_SET(r.role_name, #{model.roles}) AND
( u.user_name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.password like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.create_by like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.update_by like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.user_name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.userCustom1 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.userCustom2 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.userCustom3 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ui.email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ui.realName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or r.role_name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or r.role_name_zn like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%")
)
GROUP BY u.user_id
order by ${orderBy}
limit #{start} ,#{pageSize}

select count(*) FROM (Select 1 FROM t_user u LEFT JOIN t_user_info ui ON u.user_id = ui.user_id LEFT JOIN t_user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.`user_id` AND ui.`compID` = ur.`comp_id` LEFT JOIN t_role r ON ur.`role_id` = r.`role_id`
u.user_id = #{model.userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
u.user_name like CONCAT("%", #{model.userName}, "%") AND
u.password = #{model.password, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
u.create_by = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
u.create_time = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
u.update_by = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
u.update_time = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
u.status = #{model.status, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AND
u.needChangePwd = #{model.needChangePwd, jdbcType=BIT} AND
u.isSysUser = #{model.isSysUser, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AND
u.loginErrorCount = #{model.loginErrorCount, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
u.userCustom1 = #{model.userCustom1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
u.userCustom2 = #{model.userCustom2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
u.userCustom3 = #{model.userCustom3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
u.userCustom4 = #{model.userCustom4, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
u.userCustom5 = #{model.userCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ui.email like CONCAT("%", #{model.email}, "%") AND
ui.realName like CONCAT("%", #{model.realName}, "%") AND
ui.sex = #{model.sex} AND
ui.compID = #{model.compID} AND
ur.role_id = #{model.roleId} AND
FIND_IN_SET(r.role_name, #{model.roles}) AND
( u.user_name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.password like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.create_by like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.update_by like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.user_name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.userCustom1 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.userCustom2 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or u.userCustom3 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ui.email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ui.realName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or r.role_name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or r.role_name_zn like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%")
)
GROUP BY u.user_id ) t
mapper.update:
update t_user
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
needChangePwd = #{needChangePwd,jdbcType=BIT},
loginErrorCount = #{loginErrorCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
isSysUser = #{isSysUser,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
userCustom1 = #{userCustom1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userCustom2 = #{userCustom2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userCustom3 = #{userCustom3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userCustom4 = #{userCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER},
userCustom5 = #{userCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
UPDATE t_user SET loginErrorCount = loginErrorCount + 1, STATUS = (CASE WHEN loginErrorCount = 5 THEN 2 ELSE STATUS END ) where user_name = #{username}
mapper.select: select count(1) from t_user where user_name = #{userName}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_user
user_id,
user_name,
password,
create_by,
create_time,
update_by,
update_time,
status,
needChangePwd,
loginErrorCount,
isSysUser,
userCustom1,
userCustom2,
userCustom3,
userCustom4,
userCustom5,
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
#{needChangePwd,jdbcType=BIT},
#{loginErrorCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{isSysUser,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
#{userCustom1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userCustom2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userCustom3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
user_id = VALUES(user_id),
user_name = VALUES(user_name),
password = VALUES(password),
create_by = VALUES(create_by),
create_time = VALUES(create_time),
update_by = VALUES(update_by),
update_time = VALUES(update_time),
status = VALUES(status),
needChangePwd = VALUES(needChangePwd),
loginErrorCount = VALUES(loginErrorCount),
isSysUser = VALUES(isSysUser),
userCustom1 = VALUES(userCustom1),
userCustom2 = VALUES(userCustom2),
userCustom3 = VALUES(userCustom3),
userCustom4 = VALUES(userCustom4),
userCustom5 = VALUES(userCustom5),
mapper.select: SELECT r.home_page FROM t_user_role ur LEFT JOIN t_role r ON ur.`role_id` = r.`role_id` WHERE user_id = #{_parameter} ORDER BY r.`priority` DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT r.home_page FROM t_user_role ur LEFT JOIN t_role r ON ur.`role_id` = r.`role_id` WHERE user_id = #{userId} and comp_id = #{compID} ORDER BY r.`priority` DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT u.user_id, u.user_name, u.status, ui.id AS userInfoId, ui.realName, ui.mobile, ui.telphone, ui.avatar, ui.birthday, ui.email, ui.sex, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT r.`role_name_zn`) AS roles FROM t_user_info ui LEFT JOIN t_user u ON u.`user_id` = ui.`user_id` LEFT JOIN t_user_role ru ON ui.`user_id` = ru.`user_id` LEFT JOIN t_role_menu rm ON rm.`role_id` = ru.`role_id` LEFT JOIN t_menu m ON m.`id` = rm.`menu_id` LEFT JOIN t_role r ON rm.`role_id` = r.`role_id`
r.role_name like concat(#{roleName}, '%') AND
m.name like concat(#{menuName}, '%') AND
ui.compID = #{compID} AND
GROUP BY ui.`id`
